// Who I Am

About Me

BTech CSEGautam Buddha University

I'm a Computer Science Engineering student at Gautam Buddha University, currently serving as a Software Development Intern at GBU. I specialize in Web Development and Data Management, building live systems used by real students and faculty.

My tech journey started with C and Python, evolved through HTML/CSS and MySQL, and I'm now deepening my skills in React, PHP, and Java. I have a genuine passion for AI/ML and love merging engineering with creativity. Beyond code, I bring strong leadership experience from coordinating tech events at university level.
